header.title: API Key Management
header.intro: Configure your threat intelligence and security API keys to unlock the full potential of this platform.
header.gettingStartedBody: While initial setup requires generating multiple API keys, the enhanced security and intelligence capabilities make it worthwhile. Most services offer free tiers to get you started.

aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.description: Configure which LLM models are used as defaults across the application. Per-module overrides take priority over the global default.
aiSettings.defaultModelDescription: Fallback model used when no per-module override is set.

newsfeed_analysis_model.description: Model used when analyzing individual news articles

newsfeed_report_model.label: Newsfeed Report Generation
newsfeed_report_model.description: Model used for ranking and analyzing top articles in reports

email_analyzer_model.label: Email Analyzer
email_analyzer_model.description: Model used for AI-based email body analysis

llm_templates_model.label: LLM Templates (new template default)
llm_templates_model.description: Default model for newly created templates

modules.title: Modules
modules.description: Enable or disable modules based on your needs.

descriptions.newsfeed: Aggregate and browse cybersecurity news from RSS feeds.
descriptions.ioc_tools: Look up, extract, and analyze indicators of compromise.
descriptions.email_analyzer: Parse and inspect email headers and content.
descriptions.image_tools: View EXIF/GPS metadata and run reverse image searches.
descriptions.llm_templates: Create and run AI-powered analysis templates.
descriptions.rule_creator: Build Sigma, YARA, and Snort detection rules.

about.title: About - OSINT Toolkit
about.body: OSINT Toolkit is a self-hostable, on-demand analysis platform designed for security specialists. It consolidates various security tools into a single, easy-to-use environment, streamlining everyday investigative tasks. Optimized for single-user operation, OSINT Toolkit runs locally in a Docker container and is not intended for long-term data storage or management. Instead, it focuses on accelerating daily workflows, such as news aggregation and analysis, IOC and email investigations, and the creation of threat detection rules. To further enhance efficiency, OSINT Toolkit integrates generative AI capabilities, providing additional support for analysis and decision-making. Beyond its practical applications, the project also serves as a personal playground for experimenting with new technologies and automation possibilities, potentially laying the foundation for a future commercial cloud platform.
about.nameNote: The name OSINT Toolkit is a temporary name. The name may be changed in the future.
about.donateBody: If you want to support the development of OSINT Toolkit, you can donate using a service of your choice.
